rationale: Educ. Code §39.201 governs commissioner-awarded distinction designations for district/campus performance. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The commissioner shall award distinction designations for outstanding performance as provided by this subchapter concurrently with the assignment of performance ratings under Section 39.054.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute's distinction designation framework.
